title: Panels merged + Cast 0.3 on torso (CUBOID)
hypothesis: After dropping nano-detail and merging panels, the remaining flat-front torso panels (tunic_core, shawl_top, shawl_back, apron_wrap, skirt) still read as flat slabs. Cast 0.3 with CUBOID target rounds their corners but DOESN'T bow the front face (avoids the ellipsoid-distortion bug from the original variant E experiment). Should give the chunky-but-smooth look of the reference.
